title: clematis dioica subsp. sericea
intro: Clematis dioica subsp. sericea, also known as Sweet-scented Clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate white flowers and silky hairs. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis dioica subsp. sericea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and calm anxiety. It is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
